parameters.formDescription: Paste a sales-call transcript. An LLM extracts the key fields, then routes them to you for review before anything is saved.

options.customCss:
.rev-card { border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:12px; padding:18px 20px; background:#ffffff; box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.07); }
h3, h4 { margin:10px 0 6px; }

parameters.completionMessage: The record was approved and written to the system of record.
The record was rejected and was NOT written. Nothing saved.
